featureName: Enhanced DatePicker: Month/Year Dropdowns + Manual Input
description: Upgrade all date pickers to support (1) month/year dropdown navigation for fast long-range selection, (2) manual date text input with parsing/validation. Centralise via the shared DatePicker component and update direct Calendar usages.
prdSource: User request — screenshot of contract form date picker

userStories.title: Enable month/year dropdown on base Calendar + DatePicker
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to select month and year from dropdowns in the calendar popup, so that I can quickly navigate to dates far in the past or future without clicking arrows dozens of times.
acceptanceCriteria: Calendar component uses captionLayout='dropdown' by default
Month dropdown shows all 12 months in French (short names)
Year dropdown shows reasonable range (current year -10 to +10)
DatePicker inherits dropdown navigation automatically
Dropdown styling consistent with SEIDO design system (shadcn/ui)
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Changed captionLayout default from 'label' to 'dropdown'. Added fr locale + startMonth/endMonth defaults (+-10 years). French month names via fr-FR locale in formatMonthDropdown.

userStories.title: Add manual date text input to DatePicker
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to type a date directly in the input field (dd/MM/yyyy format) instead of only being able to click on the calendar, so that date entry is faster for known dates.
acceptanceCriteria: DatePicker shows an editable text input (not just a button trigger)
Input accepts dd/MM/yyyy format and parses it correctly
Partial/invalid input shows visual error state
Calendar popup still opens via calendar icon click
Selecting a date in the calendar updates the text input
Typing a valid date in input updates the calendar selection
Tab/Enter in input confirms the date
minDate/maxDate validation applies to typed dates too
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Replaced Button trigger with editable input. Auto-mask inserts slashes as user types digits. parseFrenchDate validates dd/MM/yyyy with rollover check. Red border on invalid. Blur reverts incomplete input. Calendar icon opens popup. defaultMonth set to selectedDate for context.

userStories.title: Update direct Calendar usages to use dropdown navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all 7 files that use <Calendar> directly (not via DatePicker) to also have month/year dropdown navigation, so the experience is consistent app-wide.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 direct Calendar consumers pass captionLayout='dropdown' or inherit it from default
intervention-create-form.tsx — calendar has dropdowns
intervention-request-form.tsx — calendar has dropdowns
time-slot-proposer.tsx — calendar has dropdowns
programming-modal-FINAL.tsx — calendar has dropdowns
assignment-section-v2.tsx — calendar has dropdowns
multi-slot-response-modal.tsx — calendar has dropdowns
email-connection-form.tsx — calendar has dropdowns
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Analyzed 7 Calendar consumers: 4 classic Popover+Button+Calendar patterns (intervention-create-form, intervention-request-form, email-connection-form) replaced with shared DatePicker component. 3 inline Calendar+TimePickers (programming-modal, assignment-section, multi-slot-response) + 1 mode=multiple (time-slot-proposer) kept as Calendar — already inherit dropdown from default captionLayout change. Cleaned up unused imports (CalendarIcon, format, Popover*, cn, useEffect, FormDescription, Separator). Pre-existing TS errors unrelated to changes.
